case_title: JESUS LORENZO SALAVERRIA VS. AIRSEALAND EXPRESS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAVERRIA, JESUS LORENZO AS TO DEFENDANT AIRSEALAND EXPRESS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAVERRIA, JESUS LORENZO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRSEALAND EXPRESS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,573.68 PRINCIPAL, $62.99 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,841.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
